response: nurse emily organizes a creative writing workshop for the older adults in her care facility by dividing them into groups of six participants to ensure personalized attention and support. she prepares three writing prompts per group and also provides an additional set of ten extra prompts to be shared equally among all the groups. the total number of writing prompts required for the session is calculated by multiplying the number of groups by the prompts per group and adding the extra prompts. the library contains a variety of writing prompts that can be used to support the participants in their creative expression. the library is a valuable resource that provides a wide range of options for the workshop. the total number of writing prompts needed is the sum of the initial prompts and the extra prompts. the library is essential in ensuring that the workshop has a sufficient number of prompts to meet the needs of all participants. is there anything else i can help with? the end.
